element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanical addition to address player feedback from MK2; meter depletes during running and combos
Pre-programmed button sequences that cannot be interrupted once first hit connects; some end with juggle-enabling knockups
Certain levels allow characters to uppercut through ceiling to continue battle in different stage; alters level cycle dynamically
New fatality variant requiring prior Mercy action; character transforms into animal to execute opponent
Allows restoring tiny health to opponent after winning two rounds; prerequisite for Animality execution
Three new stage-specific fatalities in Subway, Bell Tower, and Pit 3
Entered at VS screen in two-player mode to modify gameplay, unlock hidden characters, display messages
Entered on game over screen; unlocks robotic Smoke character variant
Single-player mode feature allowing player-selectable difficulty for various skill levels

typical_tension_triggers: Interactive stage transition disrupting expected level flow
Animality prerequisite (forced Mercy) creating two-round requirement
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced arcade fighting with moment-to-moment tactical tension; run mechanics and combos create short aggressive cycles punctuated by finishing move resolutions

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden stage 'The Vortex' (Smoke fight location name in planning, never appears in released game); hidden Smoke robot character via Ultimate Kombat Kode

difficulty_curve.early_game: Selectable difficulty via Choose Your Destiny screen accommodates various skill levels from start
difficulty_curve.late_game: Shao Kahn as final boss represents series continuation as primary antagonist
notable_spikes: Uppercut-triggered level transitions introducing dynamic stage variation mid-fight
Animality execution requiring two-round survival and Mercy setup complexity

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels feature interactive ceiling breaks allowing uppercuts to transition characters to different stage mid-fight, dynamically altering expected battle progression and level sequence
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Multiple stages (exact list not documented in sources)

notable_level_patterns.description: Specific stages (Subway, Bell Tower, Pit 3) contain environmental stage fatality mechanics, adding location-specific finishing move options
Single-player campaign progresses through series of battles against various warriors defending against Shao Kahn's Earthrealm invasion after Sindel resurrection

sources_used: Wikipedia - Mortal Kombat 3 (Gameplay, Characters, Plot sections)
The Cutting Room Floor - Mortal Kombat 3 (SNES) (technical data, hidden content)
